qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_variable as ID, t.c_variable as CODE, t.d_variable as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM LIQ09_VARIABLES as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Variables.VARIABLE\') as SEC, LIQ09_VARIABLES JOIN t.oi_variable LEFT OUTER SEC.id, t.oi_variable INNER LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable WHERE t.c_variable={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} AND LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_tipo_variable = \'1\' ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_variable as ID, t.c_variable as CODE, t.d_variable as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM LIQ09_VARIABLES as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Variables.VARIABLE\') as SEC, LIQ09_VARIABLES JOIN t.oi_variable LEFT OUTER SEC.id, t.oi_variable INNER LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable WHERE LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_tipo_variable = \'1\' ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW
